summary: Joe Reis announces a survey for his upcoming 2026 State of Data Engineering Report, emphasizing his goal to capture what's actually happening in the field rather than vendor marketing or hype cycles. He's seeking input from data practitioners across various roles to inform a free community report.
key_points: Survey covers data modeling, AI usage, architecture, team structure, pain points, and tools
Targets data engineers, analytics engineers, data analysts, MLEs, platform engineers, and architects
Report will be published free on Substack in January 2026
money_quotes: I want it to reflect what's actually happening across our field, not just vendor marketing or hype cycles.
key_insight: Understanding the real state of data engineering requires gathering practitioner perspectives rather than relying on vendor narratives.
